title: Files Gallery Pro: Manage Files At Board Level

posts.author: YuvrajSingh (Yuvraj Singh Rajput)
posts.cookedHtml:
Upload, preview, download, and delete files at the board level

Instead of uploading files at the item level, you can now upload files at the board level.

Whether managing project assets, organizing client documents, or simply centralizing team resources, Files Gallery Pro ensures your files are always accessible, actionable, and perfectly integrated into your workflow.

Why it matters: Files Gallery Pro helps teams manage all their board files in one centralized location at the Board level.

Key Features:

Effortless File Uploads: Upload files directly to your boards via a dedicated board view.

Instant File Previews: Preview a wide range of file types without ever leaving your board.

Smart Download: Download single files or bulk download multiple files with ease.

Precise Delete: Delete individual files or bulk delete multiple unnecessary files efficiently.

What can Files Gallery Pro do for you?

Upload any file type directly to your monday.com boards.

Preview images, documents, and other files instantly within the app.

Download/Delete single or bulk files with a click.

Centralize all board-related files for easy access and collaboration.

Who benefits from Files Gallery Pro?

Project Managers can upload and organize all project documents, designs, and media in one central board.

Sales & Client Teams can easily manage proposals, contracts, and client-specific files directly within their client boards.

Marketing Teams can centralize campaign assets, creative briefs, and media files for easy access and sharing.

Knowledge Managers can create a repository of important documents, guides, and resources for the entire team.

HR & Operations can efficiently manage employee records, policy documents, and onboarding materials.

Files Gallery Pro transforms how you manage and interact with your files inside monday.com.

App Install Link: https://monday.com/marketplace/listing/10000932/files-gallery-pro

Check out our full documentation for step-by-step setup and best practices.

Questions or feedback? Contact us at apps@cloudvandana.com.

Check all our apps: store.cloudvandana.com

posts.author: Thomas201Tang (Thomas201Tang)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

Files Gallery Pro is a application that transforms file management by allowing users to upload, preview, download, and delete files directly at the board level, rather than being limited to individual items. This tool centralizes all board-related assets—from project documents to media files—in a dedicated view, streamlining workflows and enhancing team collaboration for various roles like Project Managers, Marketing Teams, and HR, by providing a single source of truth for all board files.
